triggering_evidence.result: No proportional risk-neutral weight improved normal development.
triggering_evidence.donor_basis: The locked incumbent was already selected by reducing 11095:GBPUSD.DWX by two absolute percentage points because that improved both normal and adverse development results before the WS30 candidate existed.

portfolio_contract.development_survivor_rule: A frozen transfer must strictly improve both threshold and adverse development pass rates.
portfolio_contract.validation_rule: The frozen transfer must be non-inferior in both threshold and adverse 2023 results.
